root_text.an8.67:1.3: Adiṭṭhe diṭṭhavāditā, asute sutavāditā, amute mutavāditā, aviññāte viññātavāditā, diṭṭhe adiṭṭhavāditā, sute asutavāditā, mute amutavāditā, viññāte aviññātavāditā.

translation_text.an8.67:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these eight ignoble expressions.
translation_text.an8.67:1.3: Saying you’ve seen, heard, thought, or known something, but you haven’t. And saying you haven’t seen, heard, thought, or known something, and you have.
translation_text.an8.67:1.4: These are the eight ignoble expressions.”
